char_overview: Cheerful weapon designer, the younger of the Nakamura sisters. Self-developed Diffusion Type bow excels in group combat.
char_looks: 165cm. Short blue hair, often messy from workshop Deep blue eyes, bright with curiosity. Compound bow shooting attire: short vest inner, asymmetrical long windbreaker outer (short left, long right), wide-leg pants, athletic shoes. Standard-issue compound bow - spread type, 狩灵协会 standard-issue. Adds a multi-shot magazine to the standard compound bow, firing multiple arrows at once, suited for area denial and crowd control.
char_flaws: Weak in close combat; pushes modifications past safe limits.; Taps bow arm to judge accuracy by sound; talking to equipment as if it can hear her.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-狩灵箭雨: Fired arrows multiply mid-flight, forming a dense shower at impact.
char_mission: Push every prototype past its safe limit, the Diffusion Type bow is only the beginning.
char_origin: Awakened at 14 with a 灵力回路, trained in archery alongside her sister 仰光 before joining 狩灵协会3科 as an area-suppression archer.

char_relationships.仰光: Elder sister. Has never known a day without her. Seeks her approval on every design, yet snaps when she hovers too much. Leaves her best modifications on her bow, never says sorry to her face.
